Viscaria prostrata, also known as Viscaria alpina or Viscaria breviflora, is a plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. This plant is rich in health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Viscaria prostrata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
